description_long: This beer garden features a large, rectangular open-sided wooden pavilion with a steeply pitched, reddish-brown shingled roof. The structure is supported by sturdy wooden posts and beams, with decorative trusses visible at the gable ends. Beneath the roof, several long wooden benches and tables are arranged in parallel rows, providing ample communal seating. The open design allows for easy access and ventilation, making it ideal for outdoor gatherings. The overall appearance is functional yet inviting, with a focus on communal dining and socializing in a sheltered outdoor environment.
description: A spacious, open-sided wooden pavilion with a pitched red shingle roof, housing long communal benches and tables for outdoor seating.
description_view_0: End view showing the gable roof, decorative trusses, and the open entrance to the seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the pavilion, the rows of benches and tables, and the expansive roof coverage.
description_view_2: Opposite end view with clear visibility of the benches and tables beneath the roof, as well as the structural trusses.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, showing the arrangement of benches and tables under the roof and the open sides.
attribute_outdoor_seating_arrangement: Long wooden benches and tables are arranged in parallel rows beneath the pavilion roof, providing communal seating with open access from all sides. No umbrellas or additional canopies are visible.
attribute_large_communal_tables: Large communal tables are present, appearing to be approximately 2-3 meters long, made of wood, and each capable of seating 6-8 people.
